mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NOTICE WHERE BOARD_DEL_FL = 'N'
AND BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{query} || '%'

SELECT N.BOARD_NO, N.BOARD_TITLE, N.BOARD_CONTENT, N.BOARD_WRITE_DATE, N.BOARD_VIEW_COUNT, N.BOARD_DEL_FL, M.MEMBER_NAME FROM NOTICE N JOIN MEMBER M USING (MEMBER_NO) WHERE BOARD_NO = #{no} AND BOARD_DEL_FL = 'N'
